title: DSSC – LDC, MTS and More – 78 Posts
org: Lower Division Clerk, Civilian Motor Driver (Ordinary Grade), Multi Tasking Staff (Office & Training), Stenographer Grade II, Supervisor (Networking), Network Administrator, Hardware Administrator, Lineman, Boat Builder, Technical Attendant – Printing Machine Operator
applyMode: Offline - typed application form to be sent by post to Commandant, DSSC, Wellington
shortInfo: The Defence Services Staff College (DSSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 78 LDC, MTS and More. Candidates with Diploma, ITI, 12TH, 10TH Can Apply Offline. The candidate shall apply Offline through DSSC website, dssc.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: DSSC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 78 LDC, MTS and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Defence Services Staff College (DSSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 78 LDC, MTS and More. Candidates with Diploma, ITI, 12TH, 10TH Can Apply Offline. The candidate shall apply Offline through DSSC website, dssc.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Defence Services Staff College (DSSC), Wellington (Nilgiris) – 643 231, Tamil Nadu
basic_details.post_name: Lower Division Clerk, Civilian Motor Driver (Ordinary Grade), Multi Tasking Staff (Office & Training), Stenographer Grade II, Supervisor (Networking), Network Administrator, Hardware Administrator, Lineman, Boat Builder, Technical Attendant – Printing Machine Operator
basic_details.job_type: Permanent Central Government Employment (selected candidates required to serve anywhere in India)
basic_details.application_mode: Offline - typed application form to be sent by post to Commandant, DSSC, Wellington

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 21 days from date of publication (if closing date falls on a holiday, next working day is the closing date)

qualification.education_qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, Diploma, ITI, 12TH, 10TH, Any Post Graduate

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 1 (Rs. 18,000–56,900/-) to Level 5 (Rs. 29,200–92,300/-) as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must download the prescribed application form from the official DSSC website (www.dssc.gov.in). The form must be opened and filled using Adobe Reader only, typed in block letters, and taken as a colour printout - handwritten forms will not be accepted. Separate applications must be submitted for each post along with requisite documents and a separate Demand Draft. The application along with all attachments must be sent by post to the address below within 21 days from the date of publication of the advertisement in the Employment News.
